habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Earth Glide (Ex) A burrowing mud elemental can pass through dirt, gravel, or other loose or porous solid matter as easily as a fish swims through water. It cannot use this ability to pass through a solid barrier such as a stone or brick wall. Its burrowing leaves behind no tunnel or hole, nor does it create any ripple or other sign of its presence. A move earth spell cast on an area containing a burrowing mud elemental flings the elemental back 30 feet, stunning the creature for 1 round unless it succeeds on a DC 15 Fortitude save.  Entrap (Ex) The mud from an elemental's entrap ability can be washed away in 1d3 rounds of immersion in water.

A move earth spell cast on an area containing a burrowing mud elemental flings the elemental back 30 feet, stunning the creature for 1 round unless it succeeds on a DC 15 Fortitude save.  Entrap (Ex) The mud from an elemental's entrap ability can be washed away in 1d3 rounds of immersion in water.

fullStatBlock:
CR 3
Medium Mud Elemental
N Medium outsider earth, elemental, extraplanar, water
Init +0
Senses darkvision 60 ft., tremorsense 30 ft.; Perception +7
AC 16, touch 10, flat-footed 16 (+6 natural)
hp 30 ((4d10+8))
Fort +6, Ref +4, Will +1
Speed 20 ft., burrow 10 ft., swim 30 ft.
Melee Slam +7 (1d6+4 bludgeoning)
Special Attacks entrap (DC 14, 10 minutes, hardness 5, hp 5)
Special Abilities Earth Glide (Ex) A burrowing mud elemental can pass through dirt, gravel, or other loose or porous solid matter as easily as a fish swims through water. It cannot use this ability to pass through a solid barrier such as a stone or brick wall. Its burrowing leaves behind no tunnel or hole, nor does it create any ripple or other sign of its presence. A move earth spell cast on an area containing a burrowing mud elemental flings the elemental back 30 feet, stunning the creature for 1 round unless it succeeds on a DC 15 Fortitude save.  Entrap (Ex) The mud from an elemental's entrap ability can be washed away in 1d3 rounds of immersion in water.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 16, Dex 10, Con 15, Int 4, Wis 11, Cha 11
Base Atk +4; CMB +7; CMD 17
Feats Cleave, Improved Bull RushB, Power Attack
Skills Climb +8, Escape Artist +5, Knowledge (planes) +2, Perception +7, Stealth +5, Swim +11
Languages Terran
Environment  any land or water (Plane of Earth)
Organization solitary, pair, or gang (3-8)
Treasure none
Immune acid, elemental traits
Source PFRPG Bestiary 2
